issuesFound.fix: Line (in `setPeriod`, after `emit(document, 'pricing:periodchange', ...);`): Add `liveRegion.announce(`Prices switched to ${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label} billing`);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions not updating aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button does not have its `aria-expanded` attribute updated when the drawer opens or closes. Screen readers cannot convey the visibility state of the navigation.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in `open`): Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after `_open = true;`
  Line (in `close`): Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` immediately after `_open = false;`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav aria-expanded not initialised at page load
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button is not initialised with `aria-expanded="false"` when the module loads. Screen readers will not know the initial collapsed state of the mobile menu.
issuesFound.fix: Line (in `init`, after `_initialised = true;`): Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When a form field is marked invalid, the function adds an error message via aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field. Screen readers cannot identify that the field contains an invalid value.
issuesFound.fix: Line (after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);`): `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu _openInstance and _closeInstance do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu controller initializes aria-expanded="false" on the trigger during registration, but fails to update the attribute to "true" when opening or back to "false" when closing. Screen readers cannot announce the expanded/collapsed state change to users.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in _openInstance, after `inst.open = true;`): `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true);`
  Line (in _closeInstance, after `inst.open = false;`): `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);`

issuesFound.title: productFilter result count updates not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied, the product count badge is updated visually but the change is not announced via a live region. Screen reader users are not informed how many products match the current filter selection.
issuesFound.fix: Line (after `_countBadge.textContent = String(count);`): `liveRegion.announce(`${count} product${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''} found`);`

issuesFound.title: pricing billing period change not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When users switch between monthly and annual billing periods, the price values update visually but the change is not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware that the prices have changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line (after `_syncToggleState(period);`): `liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.pricingMonthly);`

issuesFound.title: scrollToTop button activation not announced
issuesFound.explanation: When the scroll-to-top button is activated, the page scrolls smoothly to the top but the action is not announced to screen readers, leaving users uncertain whether the button worked.
issuesFound.fix: Line (at start of function): `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.scrolledToTop || 'Scrolled back to top of page');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer not removed from accessibility tree when closed
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer is hidden via CSS class toggling but remains in the accessibility tree because aria-hidden is not set to "true" when closed. Screen readers may still navigate to off-screen drawer content.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in close function, after `removeClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`): `setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true');`
  Line (in open function, after `addClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`): `removeAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer missing modal ARIA attributes
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer acts as a modal dialog when open but lacks role="dialog" and aria-modal="true", and lacks an accessible name via aria-label or aria-labelledby.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1995: After obtaining _drawer, add `setAttr(_drawer, 'role', 'dialog');`, `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-modal', 'true');`, and `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-label', 'Main navigation menu');`.

issuesFound.title: productFilter result count not announced

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle missing aria-expanded update

issuesFound.title: siteSearch._open() does not update aria-expanded on combobox input

issuesFound.title: Pricing toggle switch does not update aria-checked state

issuesFound.fix: Line 4550: Inside the `if (_toggleEl && _toggleTrack)` block, add `setAttr(_toggleEl, ARIA.CHECKED, isYear);` after `toggleClass(_toggleTrack, CSS.checked, isYear);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance() does not update aria-expanded on trigger

issuesFound.title: siteSearch._close() does not update aria-expanded on combobox input

issuesFound.fix: Line 4130: Add `setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);` immediately after the line `_searchState.open = false;`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle does not update aria-expanded on trigger
